title: justicia strigilis
intro: Justicia strigilis, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or the Justicia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Justicia strigilis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its use as an antiviral and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Justicia strigilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin infections.
